news.title: UAE's shock OPEC exit: What it means for the oil cartel's future and for crude prices
news.description: The UAE wants to ramp up production without constraints from OPEC, which could prove bearish for prices at some point.

news.title: Starbucks raises full-year outlook after earnings, revenue top estimates
news.description: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.

news.title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
news.description: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.

news.title: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday
news.description: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.

news.title: These bonds protect against inflation. How to optimize them for your portfolio
news.description: Treasury inflation-protected securities are back in the mix as investors grapple with worries over higher prices.

news.title: Elon Musk takes the stand in OpenAI trial: Live updates
news.description: Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman and Greg Brockman in 2024, claiming they reneged on their promise to keep the artificial intelligence lab a nonprofit.

news.title: FCC launches review of Disney broadcast licenses years ahead of schedule
news.description: The Federal Communications Commission has told Disney to file its broadcast license renewals early, citing concerns around its DEI policies.

news.title: Ex-FBI Director James Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in ‘8647’ post
news.description: Trump had accused Comey of "calling for the assassination of the president" by sharing the image of the numbers in the May 15 Instagram post.

news.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
news.description: The UAE's decision, after nearly 60 years of membership, is seen as a potential death knell for the oil cartel.

news.title: Faisal Islam: Why the UAE's exit from Opec is a big deal
news.description: It will have little effect on the current oil blockades, but it could change everything afterwards.

news.title: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
news.description: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

news.title: Nostalgia wasn't enough: What went wrong at Claire's
news.description: Experts says Claire's suffered from a perfect storm of issues which has spelled the end for the accessories chain.

news.title: BP profits more than double as Iran war sends oil prices higher
news.description: The energy giant said it had seen an "exceptional" performance at its oil trading business.

news.title: Why Spotify has no button to filter out AI music
news.description: Music streamer Deezer allows users to filter out AI music, so why does Spotify not offer the same?

news.title: Why Sam Altman and his former hero Elon Musk are taking their toxic feud to court
news.description: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.

news.title: My tenant owes £15,000 in rent, but I can't get them out of the property
news.description: Landlords tell BBC News why they fear new laws could make it harder to remove problematic tenants.

news.title: OpenAI brings its models to Amazon's cloud after ending exclusivity with Microsoft
news.description: OpenAI's generative AI models are becoming available on Amazon's cloud a day after the AI company revamped its relationship with longtime partner Microsoft.

news.title: Cramer says the OpenAI-driven pullback proves recent rally was overheated
news.description: Jim Cramer said Tuesday's market reaction to The Wall Street Journal's OpenAI report shows that some AI stocks got overheated.

news.title: OpenAI's revenue, growth estimates fall short as company races toward IPO: Report
news.description: Hundreds of billions in datacenter computing deals are closely tied to OpenAI

news.title: Spotify stock plummets after earnings beat expectations as guidance disappoints
news.description: The Swedish audiostreamer's soft guidance overshadowed an earnings beat.

news.title: Meta's new AI model shows early promise, but investors want to see Zuckerberg's strategy
news.description: Meta introduced its new AI model at the beginning of the second quarter, so Mark Zuckerberg's commentary about the future will be key during earnings.

news.title: Tech's hyperscalers face Wall Street for first time since U.S. Iran war sent oil prices soaring
news.description: Wall Street is optimistic about big tech companies and their data center construction plans, despite a memory shortage and the Iran war.

news.title: Musk and Altman go to trial, GM earnings, Spotify's fitness push and more in Morning Squawk
news.description: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: True Anomaly raises $650 million to support space interceptors for Trump's Golden Dome
news.description: True Anomaly, a four-year-old startup, plans to use the funding to scale manufacturing and double its workforce by the end of the year.

chinaNews.description: 周二美股成交额第1名英伟达收跌1.59%，成交378.53亿美元。OpenAI的合作伙伴如软银集团和甲骨文的股价出现下跌，此前有报道称，这家AI初创公司近期未能实现销售和新增用户目...

chinaNews.title: 美国股市：标普500指数自纪录高点回落 OpenAI相关报道引发科技股担忧
chinaNews.description: 科技巨头遭抛售拖累美国股市，就在交易员准备迎接一系列大型科技公司的业绩发布之际，对人工智能巨额投资能否带来回报的担忧再度升温。

chinaNews.title: 大宗商品综述：油价重回110美元上方 黄金和铜下跌
chinaNews.description: 虽然阿联酋出人意料地宣布退出OPEC，但由于全球投资者的关注焦点仍是美伊谈判局势的发展，布伦特原油重回每桶110美元上方，黄金价格也下跌。

chinaNews.description: 美国盘中短期到中期国债承压走低，油价延续本周涨势，交易员密切关注霍尔木兹海峡局势。美国7年期国债中标收益率较发行前交易水平高约0.5个基点...
